.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat the MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH string constant to a single line.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line break in string assignment.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat the MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH string constant to a single line.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line break in string assignment.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Add space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard Java coding style.
Add space after 'if' keyword in null check to comply with standard Java coding style.
Add space after 'if' keyword in directory existence check to comply with standard Java coding style.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Adjusted indentation and line breaks for new Authenticator() block.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Remove trailing empty line at the end of the file.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 13+ text blocks for improved readability.
Add CRLF_SAFE_MARKER to log output to prevent log injection vulnerabilities or formatting issues.
Modify active profiles logging to show default profiles when no active profiles are explicitly set.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or formatting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "'{}'" to "'{}'" in logger.error format string.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Replace manual Mongock bean configuration with the Spring Boot starter annotation to simplify database migration setup.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added @EnableMongock annotation and removed the manual MongockInitializingBeanRunner bean definition along with its dependencies.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Clean up import statements that are no longer used after removing the manual Mongock configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for Mongock classes, Logger, ApplicationContext, MongoTemplate, and Value annotation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the logger field that was only used in the removed Mongock configuration logic.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Deleted the private final Logger log field declaration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove Jackson configuration beans and imports for Zalando Problem modules, likely due to dependency removal or migration to a different error handling strategy.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule and deleted their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with the modern SecurityFilterChain bean approach required by Spring Security 5.7+.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support Spring Security 5.7+ method security.
Replace deprecated authorizeRequests() with authorizeHttpRequests() and antMatchers() with requestMatchers() for Spring Security 5.7+.
Refactor header configuration to use the new lambda DSL and replace deprecated featurePolicy with permissionsPolicy.
Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handlers with standard OAuth2 BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
Enable OAuth2 Resource Server JWT support to replace the legacy custom JWT filter configuration.
Replace the manual CorsFilter injection with a new SpaWebFilter added after BasicAuthenticationFilter.
Move Content Security Policy directives from hardcoded strings to JHipsterProperties configuration.
Change frame options from deny to sameOrigin to align with modern SPA requirements.
Add explicit authorization rule requiring ADMIN authority for /v3/api-docs endpoints.
Update permitAll rules to explicitly allow static assets and index.html for SPA support.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the specific app subdirectory in favor of the root static directory.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed RESOURCE_LOCATIONS from including 'classpath:/static/app/' to just 'classpath:/static/'

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced RESOURCE_PATHS array with specific extensions like '/*.js', '/*.css' and adjusted wildcards for content and i18n

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify type checking and casting logic.
Remove try-catch block for UnsupportedEncodingException because StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always supported in modern Java, simplifying code.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, supporting newer Spring Security CORS API.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3 endpoints, removing legacy Swagger 2 paths.
Replace deprecated Mongock v3 annotations with the new v5 annotation API to ensure compatibility with the updated library version.
Switch from the deprecated MongockTemplate wrapper to the standard Spring Data MongoTemplate required by the new Mongock version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed method parameter and field type from MongockTemplate to MongoTemplate.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Restructure the migration class to use constructor injection and separate execution/rollback logic as required by the new Mongock API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added constructor for MongoTemplate injection and split logic into changeSet() and rollback() methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor inline authority creation into dedicated helper methods to improve code readability and maintainability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Extracted logic into createAuthority(), createAdminAuthority(), and createUserAuthority() methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor inline user creation into dedicated helper methods to improve code readability and maintainability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Extracted logic into createUser() and createAdmin() methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Correct the default first name for the 'user' account from an empty string to 'User' for consistency.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed setFirstName("") to setFirstName("User") in the user creation logic.
